hero.description: Based in Bogotá, Colombia. I specialize in building scalable architectures, automating infrastructure with Kubernetes and CI/CD pipelines, and developing robust platforms using modern stacks (React, NestJS, Python, AWS).

about_details.title: About Me
about_details.bio: Beyond software engineering, I have a deep passion for biology and the natural world, particularly the ocean and its marine life. When I'm not coding, you can usually find me solving Rubik's cubes or playing classical guitar—my repertoire includes Bach's Bourrée, Piazzolla's Libertango, and Arabian-Spanish pieces like Capricho Árabe and Asturias.
achievements: Graduated from Universidad de los Andes (Uniandes)
Awarded the prestigious 'Generación E' National Scholarship
2nd Place Winner at the Web 3.0 Hackathon
